steps.title: Find the belief that drives the action
steps.content: The passage states that Nazareth believed Elvis's music is best understood as an anthology because Elvis showcased contributions of many gospel, blues, and rock artists. This belief sets up the reason for his later action.

steps.title: Match the transition to the purpose
steps.content: To that end shows that Nazareth titled his course in order to put his belief into practice. The other three either add a point, summarize, or restate, none of which express purpose. That matches choice D — D is correct.
